item.title: Why is Mankind Pharma Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 22-Apr, Mankind Pharma Ltd’s stock price has risen by 1.74% to ₹2,233.85, continuing a recent streak of gains despite some underlying financial challenges. This article analyses the factors driving the stock’s recent rise and the contrasting longer-term performance metrics. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Why is PTL Enterprises Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 22 Apr, PTL Enterprises Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹39.86, up by ₹1.13 or 2.92%.
